title: Arjuna Vishada Yoga
summary: Arjuna's grief opens the battlefield of conscience and prepares the need for spiritual guidance.
insight_caption: Chapter 1 establishes the emotional battlefield, showing Arjuna's conflict before any spiritual teaching begins.

title: Sankhya Yoga
summary: Krishna introduces self-knowledge, steady wisdom, and detached action as the core teaching frame of the Gita.
insight_caption: Chapter 2 introduces the core teaching of the Gita: steady wisdom, self-knowledge, and detached action.

title: Karma Yoga
summary: Action becomes a sacred path when it is performed without selfish attachment and with responsibility.
insight_caption: Chapter 3 emphasizes responsible action as a path of service, discipline, and spiritual alignment.

title: Jnana Yoga
summary: Knowledge illuminates action, revealing how wisdom transforms duty into liberating practice.
insight_caption: Chapter 4 connects knowledge and action, showing how wisdom transforms the intention behind work.

title: Karma Sanyasa Yoga
summary: Renunciation is clarified as freedom from egoistic clinging rather than withdrawal from work itself.
insight_caption: Chapter 5 shows that true renunciation is not withdrawal from action, but freedom from ego and attachment within action.

title: Dhyana Yoga
summary: Meditation gathers the mind, stabilizes awareness, and turns discipline into inward realization.
insight_caption: Chapter 6 focuses on meditation, training the mind toward steadiness, restraint, and inward absorption.

title: Jnana Vijnana Yoga
summary: Krishna reveals the deeper knowledge that joins philosophical understanding with lived divine awareness.
insight_caption: Chapter 7 deepens knowledge by linking metaphysical clarity with a more intimate recognition of the divine.

title: Akshara Brahma Yoga
summary: The chapter explores remembrance, mortality, and the imperishable reality behind changing life.
insight_caption: Chapter 8 contemplates death, remembrance, and the path toward the imperishable reality beyond change.

title: Raja Vidya Raja Guhya Yoga
summary: Devotion becomes a royal path where intimacy with the divine and profound knowledge meet.
insight_caption: Chapter 9 presents devotion as a royal path, joining intimacy with the divine and profound spiritual knowledge.

title: Vibhuti Yoga
summary: The divine is recognized through exalted manifestations spread across the world of experience.
insight_caption: Chapter 10 reveals the divine through countless manifestations, helping the seeker see sacred presence everywhere.

title: Vishvarupa Darshana Yoga
summary: Arjuna receives the cosmic vision and confronts the overwhelming vastness of divine reality.
insight_caption: Chapter 11 gives the cosmic vision, overwhelming ordinary perception with the vastness of divine reality.

title: Bhakti Yoga
summary: Devotion is distilled into loving qualities of heart, simplicity, and steady relational trust.
insight_caption: Chapter 12 distills devotion into qualities of heart, simplicity, and deep relational trust in the divine.

title: Kshetra-Kshetrajna Vibhaga Yoga
summary: The field of experience is distinguished from the knower, clarifying body, mind, and consciousness.
insight_caption: Chapter 13 distinguishes the field of experience from the knower, clarifying the relation between body and consciousness.

title: Gunatraya Vibhaga Yoga
summary: The three gunas are explained as patterns that condition temperament, behavior, and perception.
insight_caption: Chapter 14 explains the three gunas and how they shape temperament, behavior, and spiritual movement.

title: Purushottama Yoga
summary: The chapter points toward the supreme person beyond the shifting field of worldly existence.
insight_caption: Chapter 15 points toward the supreme person beyond the changing world, revealing a deeper source of being.

title: Daivasura Sampad Vibhaga Yoga
summary: Divine and destructive tendencies are contrasted so ethical character can be consciously shaped.
insight_caption: Chapter 16 contrasts divine and demonic tendencies, making moral character part of spiritual discernment.

title: Shraddhatraya Vibhaga Yoga
summary: Faith is shown to express itself through temperament, worship, discipline, and daily habits.
insight_caption: Chapter 17 examines how faith colors worship, discipline, speech, food, and intention.

title: Moksha Sanyasa Yoga
summary: The Gita concludes by integrating action, renunciation, devotion, knowledge, and liberation.
insight_caption: Chapter 18 gathers the whole teaching into an integrated vision of freedom, surrender, right action, and final release.
